page: Amazon Web Services p5en.48xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance designed for high-performance computing workloads. It is built on the AWS Nitro hypervisor and features an Intel x86_64 architecture with 192 virtual CPUs derived from 96 physical cores. The dedicated processors operate at a clock speed of 2.4 GHz, with hyperthreading enabled at two threads per core.

The instance is equipped with 2048.0 GB of system memory, providing 10.67 GB of RAM per physical core. Acceleration is delivered via eight NVIDIA Hopper H200 GPUs, offering a combined GPU video RAM of 1128 GB. For local storage, the server includes 30400 GB of NVMe SSD capacity, supporting high-throughput local data access.

Networking capabilities include a baseline bandwidth of 200 Gbps. The hardware profile represents a high-density resource allocation, positioning it in a premium cost-efficiency tier where massive parallel processing and high-speed local storage offset the resource overhead. This server is designed for workloads such as large language model training, deep learning, high-performance computing, and large-scale data science jobs.
description: Amazon Web Services p5en.48xlarge is a high-performance, GPU-accelerated server instance designed for intensive computational workloads. Built on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, it features an Intel x86_64 architecture with 192 vCPUs across 96 physical cores running at 2.4 GHz. The system is equipped with 2048.0 GB of system memory and eight NVIDIA Hopper H200 GPUs, providing a total of 1128 GB of VRAM. For high-speed local data access, the instance includes 30400 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 200 Gbps. Given its massive GPU, memory, and storage resources, this instance is optimized for demanding workloads such as deep learning, large language model training, and complex data science simulations.
og_description: Amazon Web Services p5en.48xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 192 vCPUs, 2048 GB RAM, eight NVIDIA H200 GPUs with 1128 GB VRAM, and 30400 GB of local NVMe SSD storage.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services p5en.48xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server with 192 vCPUs, 2048 GB RAM, 8 NVIDIA H200 GPUs, and 30400 GB NVMe SSD storage.
tagline: A high-density GPU instance featuring eight NVIDIA H200 accelerators, massive NVMe storage, and high-bandwidth networking for intensive parallel computing.
bullet_points: Eight NVIDIA Hopper H200 GPUs with 1128 GB total VRAM
192 vCPUs powered by Intel x86_64 processors at 2.4 GHz
2048.0 GB of system memory and 30400 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
200 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on the AWS Nitro hypervisor
Optimized for deep learning, large language model training, and data science
